faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Kearny, NJ?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal services in Kearny typically range from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, location of entry points, and extent of damage repairs needed. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Kearny neighborhoods?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are increasingly common in Kearny due to its proximity to the Passaic River and Meadowlands wildlife corridors. They often seek shelter in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces, especially during breeding season in spring and when seeking warm denning sites in fall and winter.

faqs.question: Is raccoon removal in Kearny humane and legal?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We follow all New Jersey wildlife regulations and use humane trapping and exclusion methods. Our licensed technicians safely relocate raccoons according to state guidelines and ensure all removal practices comply with local Kearny and Hudson County ordinances.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Kearny property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day emergency service throughout Kearny. Most raccoon removals are completed within 3-7 days depending on the situation, with follow-up exclusion work scheduled immediately after to prevent re-entry. We're available 24/7 for urgent wildlife situations.
